testcase.name: test_track_url_encoded_order_number_appended

failure.message:
AssertionError: Track link not appended; body_lines=['Reference: Order HRE/ORD/2026-27/0042', 'Your shipment has been dispatched today', 'Items in this shipment: SKU-1', 'Transporter: BlueDart · LR No: LR-1', 'Tax Invoice, E-Way Bill and LR Copy are attached'] assert 'Track live: https://quote.hrexporter.com/track?order_number=HRE%2FORD%2F2026-27%2F0042' in 'Reference: Order HRE/ORD/2026-27/0042
Your shipment has been dispatched today
Items in this shipment: SKU-1
Transporter: BlueDart · LR No: LR-1
Tax Invoice, E-Way Bill and LR Copy are attached'

testcase.failure:
